message:
feat(conformance): add 108 blocking command tests + fix timeout error messages

New core_blocking.json suite covers all 8 blocking commands (BLPOP,
BRPOP, BLMOVE, BLMPOP, BRPOPLPUSH, BZPOPMIN, BZPOPMAX, BZMPOP) with
arity validation, timeout validation, WRONGTYPE errors, immediate-return
with data, multiple-key fallthrough, and case insensitivity.

Fix parse_blocking_timeout to return Redis-accurate error messages:
- "ERR timeout is negative" (was "ERR syntax error")
- "ERR timeout is not a float or out of range" (was "ERR value is not a valid float")

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
